name: arxiv-search
description: Search and retrieve scientific papers from ArXiv

name: browser-automation
description: Web browser automation for tasks requiring UI interaction, login-protected pages, or human-like browsing when APIs are insufficient.

name: code-agent
description: Autonomous coding agent. Delegate any task that involves understanding, writing, or running code — from a GitHub issue, a bug report, or a user request. It explores, implements, and verifies on its own.

name: code-interpreter
description: Test and prototype code in a sandboxed environment. Use for debugging, verifying logic, or installing packages.

name: doc-coauthoring
description: Guide users through a structured workflow for co-authoring documentation. Use when user wants to write documentation, proposals, technical specs, decision docs, or similar structured content. This workflow helps users efficiently transfer context, refine content through iteration, and verify the doc works for readers. Trigger when user mentions writing docs, creating proposals, drafting specs, or similar documentation tasks.

name: excalidraw
description: Create hand-drawn style diagrams and flowcharts using Excalidraw

name: excel-spreadsheets
description: Create, modify, and manage Excel spreadsheets.

name: financial-news
description: Stock quotes, price history, financial news, and analysis

name: github
description: Manage GitHub issues, PRs, branches, and repositories via OAuth (3LO). For reading issues or PR details, not for deep code analysis — delegate that to code-agent.

name: gmail
description: Read, send, draft, delete, and organize Gmail emails

name: google-calendar
description: View, create, update, and delete calendar events

name: google-maps
description: Place search, directions, geocoding, and interactive maps

name: google-web-search
description: Google web search with integrated image results

name: notion
description: Search, read, create, and update Notion pages and databases. Supports knowledge capture, meeting prep, research documentation, and spec-to-task workflows.

name: powerpoint-presentations
description: Create, modify, and manage PowerPoint presentations.

name: research-agent
description: Deep research with structured reports and charts. ONLY use when the user explicitly requests research/analysis, or needs data visualization with charts, or quantitative/comparative analysis across multiple sources. Do NOT use for simple questions or quick lookups.

name: tavily-search
description: AI-powered web search and content extraction

name: url-fetcher
description: Fetch and extract text content from web page URLs.

name: visual-design
description: Use this skill any time the user needs a visual output as an image

name: visualization
description: Create interactive chart visualizations (bar, line, pie) from data.

name: weather
description: Current weather and multi-day forecasts worldwide

name: web-search
description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo for current information, news, and research topics.

name: wikipedia-search
description: Wikipedia article search and retrieval

name: word-documents
description: Create, modify, and manage Word documents.

name: workspace
description: Read and write files in the shared session workspace. Use this to access files created by any skill — code-agent outputs, office documents, images, and more. All within the same isolated session.
